input.headline: Kissing is an ‘evolutionary conundrum.’ Scientists just mapped its unexpected origins

raw.headline: Kissing is an ‘evolutionary conundrum.’ Scientists just mapped its unexpected origins

winner: Why was the map of kissing a bit perplexed? Because it had trouble wrapping its arms around the evolutionary conundrum!

candidates.text: Why did the scientist bring a map to the kiss-off party? Because he wanted to chart the evolutionary conundrum of goodbyes!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat related to the headline but lacks specificity and surprise. The pun on 'kiss-off party' is mild and not strongly tied to the scientific context of evolutionary conundrums."}

candidates.text: Why did the map say "Kiss me?" Because it was evolutionarily perplexed and needed a smooch to figure out its origins!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat playful and ties into the headline, but it's a bit forced and lacks clarity. The pun on 'map' and 'smooch' is weak, and the connection to evolutionary conundrum isn't clearly made."}

candidates.text: Why did scientists create a map of kissing origins? Because they needed directions for getting out of this lip-lock predicament!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat related to the headline and uses a play on words with 'map' and 'directions,' but the humor feels forced and lacks the surprise or specificity that would make it more effective."}

candidates.text: Ah, evolution's latest puzzle - kissing! It's a complete mystery... or at least that's what my lips said after last night.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat related to the headline and has a mild punchline, but it lacks specificity and surprise. The reference to 'my lips said' feels generic and doesn't tie directly to the scientific angle of the headline."}
